name: clinical-evidence
description: Clinical evidence synthesis and protocol review. Three co-designed skills — literature-search, research-summary, protocol-reviewer — share a single evidence-search agent that gathers and verifies PubMed/Scholar Gateway/guideline evidence into a hidden reference ledger. literature-search is the user-facing search trigger; research-summary writes a narrative evidence summary from the ledger; protocol-reviewer reviews an uploaded clinical protocol against it. The ledger handoff is invisible to the researcher. Designed for UK NHS clinical context with ISO 42001 transparency disclaimers.
